phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Villa Comunale park is
phrases.cultural_note: The Villa Comunale is Naples' main seafront park, stretching along Via Caracciolo with views of the bay and Vesuvius.

responses.english: On the seafront, five minutes on foot.
responses.phonetic: sool loon-goh-MAH-reh, ah CHEEN-kweh mee-NOO-tee ah PYEH-dee.
responses.french: Sul lungomare, a cinque minuti a piedi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find upscale restaurants in Chiaia
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove ci sono i migliori ristoranti a Chiaia?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh chee SOH-noh ee meel-YOH-ree rees-toh-RAN-tee ah KYAH-yah?

responses.english: On Via dei Mille and Via Bisignano, central area.
responses.phonetic: een VEE-ah day MEEL-leh eh VEE-ah bee-zeen-YAH-noh, DZOH-nah chen-TRAH-leh.
responses.french: In Via dei Mille e Via Bisignano, zona centrale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to shop for local designer brands
phrases.text_local: Scusi, ci sono negozi di moda locale a Chiaia?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, chee SOH-noh neh-GOH-tsee dee MOH-dah loh-KAH-leh ah KYAH-yah?

responses.english: Yes, on Via Filangieri and Via dei Mille.
responses.phonetic: see, een VEE-ah fee-lan-JEH-ree eh VEE-ah day MEEL-leh.
responses.french: Sì, in Via Filangieri e Via dei Mille.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which metro stop is closest to Chiaia
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quale fermata della metro è più vicina a Chiaia?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAH-leh fer-MAH-tah DEL-lah MEH-troh eh PYOO vee-CHEE-nah ah KYAH-yah?

responses.phonetic: ah-meh-DEH-oh, LEE-neh-ah OO-noh, ah treh mee-NOO-tee.
responses.french: Amedeo, linea uno, a tre minuti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if Chiaia is safe to walk at night
phrases.text_local: Scusi, Chiaia è sicura la sera?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KYAH-yah eh see-KOO-rah lah SEH-rah?

responses.phonetic: see, eh eel kwahr-TYEH-reh PYOO tran-KWEEL-loh dee NAH-poh-lee.
responses.french: Sì, è il quartiere più tranquillo di Napoli.
